rows.notes: Clearly printed centered page title. No amounts appear on the same line.

Pounds (193) and shillings (9) align clearly in the left and middle amount columns. The pence column shows a small '2' aligned with the row. Description is legible though abbreviation 'D no' interpreted as 'Domino' (Rector).
rows.english_description: Payment to the Rector, the scholars, and the college officers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Rector, the scholars, and the college officers, amounting to £193 9s 2d.

rows.description: L W Wencham Div. to Lady Day
rows.notes: Pounds (197) and shillings (6) are clear. Pence shows '3' with a trailing loop/mark that matches the 3/4 (three‑quarters) symbol used on the page; alignment with column lines is consistent.
rows.english_description: Payment of W. Wencham's dividend/stipend for Lady Day.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of W. Wencham's dividend/stipend for Lady Day, amounting to £197 6s 3.75d.

rows.notes: Pound (20) clearly visible. Shillings appear to be '6' and pence '8' though the pence digit is slightly lighter; column alignment supports reading as 6s 8d.
rows.english_description: Payment of W. Wencham's dividend/stipend for Michaelmas (same as previous entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of W. Wencham's dividend/stipend for Michaelmas, amounting to £20 6s 8d.

rows.notes: Pounds (26) and shillings (10) are clearly aligned. There is no pence mark in the rightmost column for this row (interpreted as 0d). Description is somewhat abbreviated but matches the visible words.
rows.english_description: Stipend payment at the Feast of the Nativity (Christmas) to officers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment at the Feast of the Nativity to officers, amounting to £26 10s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds (30) clear. Shillings/pence columns are blank/zero. Description 'Augment.' and place names readable.
rows.english_description: Augmentation payment to the livings of Newington and Merton (top-up grants).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment to Newington and Merton, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds (54) clear. Shillings/pence appear blank. The description is partly abbreviated and faint in places; 'Thiers' and the parenthetical '(P.T. Ded)' interpreted from handwriting.
rows.english_description: Stipend payment to Thiers (with a noted deduction).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment to Thiers (with deduction noted), amounting to £54 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds (30), shillings (9) and pence (2) align well. 'Do.' (ditto) and 'Rectori' are legible; consistent with prior pattern of entries.
rows.english_description: Stipend payment to the Rector (same type of payment as the preceding stipend).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment to the Rector, amounting to £30 9s 2d.

rows.notes: Pounds (17) and shillings (3) are clear. Pence looks like '9' with a small loop suggesting a halfpenny ('ob') giving 9 1/2d; loop is less bold than other fraction marks but alignment and similarity to other halfpenny marks on the page support 0.5.
rows.english_description: Dividend/augmentation payment to Merton for Lady Day.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend/augmentation payment to Merton for Lady Day, amounting to £17 3s 9.5d.

rows.notes: Pounds (77) and shillings (3) clear. Pence looks like '8' with a trailing loop consistent with the halfpenny symbol; read as 8 1/2d. Ink for fraction loop is fainter but matches other halfpenny marks on the page.
rows.english_description: Dividend/augmentation payment to Merton for Michaelmas (same as previous entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividend/augmentation payment to Merton for Michaelmas, amounting to £77 3s 8.5d.

rows.notes: Pounds (31), shillings (13), pence (4) align well. Description is slightly abbreviated but the key text 'Stipend' and 'Annum' were readable.
rows.english_description: Stipend paid at a festival for the year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend paid at a festival for the year, amounting to £31 13s 4d.

rows.notes: Pounds (34), shillings (5), pence (3) clear. 'Kidlington' and 'Augment.' are legible; 'pro 3d ann. part.' read as an abbreviation for portion of the annual augmentation.
rows.english_description: Augmentation payment for Kidlington for the third part of the year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payment for Kidlington for the third part of the year, amounting to £34 5s 3d.

rows.notes: Pounds (30), shillings (9), pence (2) visible and align with ruler lines. 'Do.' and 'ut supra' (as above) are readable.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Rector, as above (same type of payment referenced previously).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Rector as above, amounting to £30 9s 2d.

rows.notes: Pounds (19) clear; shillings and pence columns are blank (0). Description contains abbreviations ('D. & I. Bapt.') which were read from the script but are somewhat cramped.
rows.english_description: Stipend payment relating to baptisms and to officers.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment for baptisms and officers, amounting to £19 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Pounds (30) visible; shillings/pence blank. The description reads 'D no Thiers' with a parenthetical '(P.T.)' — letters faint but interpretable from context (matches earlier similar lines).
rows.english_description: Payment to Thiers (noted with P.T. annotation).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Thiers, amounting to £30 0s 0d.

rows.description: Augment. Com. Do. Mod. & Subdec. Do.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Augmentation payments to the common fund, the moderator, and the sub-dean, amounting to £50 0s 8d.

rows.description: Do. Kidlington pro 4a part. ann. Do.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Kidlington augmentation for the fourth part of the year, amounting to £11 8s 5d.

rows.notes: Pounds (30), shillings (9), pence (2) clear and repeat a pattern seen elsewhere. 'ut supra' is legible confirming repetition of Rector entries.
rows.english_description: Payment to the Rector (as noted above).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Rector, amounting to £30 9s 2d.

rows.notes: Pounds (25) and shillings (10) visible; pence blank. The place name is faint/uncertain ('Grvincar' is best-effort reading of the script) so lower confidence on description while amounts align reliably.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Stipend payment to Grvincar at Michaelmas, amounting to £25 10s 0d.

rows.description: Lt W Wencham pro augment. (Com. P.T.D.)
rows.notes: Pounds (36), shillings (14), pence (4) are legible. Description contains abbreviations and a parenthetical which are faint but match the pattern of earlier 'Wencham' entries; moderate confidence.

rows.notes: Final repeating Rector entry: pounds (30), shillings (9), pence (2) align clearly. 'ut supra' visible confirming repetition.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the Rector, amounting to £30 9s 2d.

rows.notes: Bottom-right total line is clearly boxed and reads 1036 pounds, 15 shillings, 5 and 3/4 pence. Alignment with the three ruling lines is clear; the three‑quarter fraction mark is consistent with other 3/4 marks on the page.
